scripts.build: pnpm sync && node ./scripts/check-doc-api-symbols.mjs && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
scripts.check: pnpm sync && node ./scripts/check-content-contracts.mjs && node ./scripts/check-translation-lag.mjs --strict && node ./scripts/check-doc-api-symbols.mjs && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check
